sentences.arabic: تَشْرَبُ أَمِيرَةُ فِنْجَانَ قَهْوَةٍ وَاحِدَةً فِي الصَّبَاحِ فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Amira pije samo jednu šolju kafe ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: Amira drinks only one cup of coffee in the morning.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لَهَا الطَّبِيبُ أَلَّا تَشْرَبَ كَثِيرًا مِنَ الْقَهْوَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljekar joj je rekao da ne pije previše kafe.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor told her not to drink too much coffee.

sentences.arabic: تَشْرَبُ بَعْدَ الظُّهْرِ شَايًا أَخْضَرَ بَدَلَ الْقَهْوَةِ.
sentences.translation: Poslije podne pije zeleni čaj umjesto kafe.
sentences.translationEn: After noon she drinks green tea instead of coffee.

sentences.arabic: تَشْعُرُ الْآنَ بِنَوْمٍ أَفْضَلَ فِي اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translationEn: She now sleeps better at night.
